name: arabic-training-plan
description: Build and run a Test-Teach-Test training plan for Arabic vocabulary (Najdi Saudi or MSA). Decomposes a learning goal into SMART / Motivation / Core Principles (dialect grammar) / Key Facts (vocabulary batches). Interactive TTT sessions instead of flashcards. Audio generated once per word into a referenced folder. Spaced retention checks drive each sub-goal toward full memorisation.
